name: Senior and Junior
original_name: រឿង​ សិស្សច្បងសិស្សប្អូន
overview: Dean started flirting with San until he became his boyfriend. Dean often went to sleep over at San’s house without letting San’s mother know that they were dating each other. At school, things started to crumble because Dean was flirted with by juniors and San was flirted with by seniors, both male and female. Their secret relationship began to be noticed by people around them, no matter how hard they tried to hide it. What solutions can Dean and San come up with to make their love life better without hurting each other?
